sys_script_client.description:
2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010501 - Organizational Member, from has missing information message and spelling errors.
v 2.7 STRY0112585 - Task Executive- Update for New Member Form v 2.5.13 RLS - STRY0065050
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Allows the user to add/update members for the selected Organizational Unit. Tasker - Allows the user to add/update Sub Organizational Units in all OUs, and manage their Members. Tasker - Allows the user to add/update Sub Organizational Units, and manage Members in the selected Organizational Unit. Tasker - Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal templates. Tasker - Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal & OU templates. Tasker - Allows the user to create/update/delete Personal, OU, and Global templates. Tasker - Manage template permissions for Personal, OU, and Global template designers. Tasker - Manage Task assignment for the selected Organizational Unit | Inherits OU Template Designer role. Tasker - Manage Task assignment in all OUs | Provide Tasking Manager role for an OU | Reviews and approves Suggested Tasks | Inherits Global Template Designer role.
sys_script_client.name: OU Member - onLoad - Show InfoMessages
